file_insights.changes: Created new domain model with freezed annotation and full JSON serialization support
Created repository interface with offline-first methods returning RepositoryOperationResult
Created offline-aware implementation extending OfflineAwareRepository with comprehensive CRUD operations
Added journal CRUD GraphQL queries (getJournals, getJournal, createJournal, updateJournal, deleteJournal)
Registered JournalRepository and its dependencies (JournalDao, DioApiService, ConnectivityService, SyncQueueService)

patterns_discovered.description: Consistent use of OfflineAwareRepository base class pattern established by TripRepository
patterns_discovered.evidence: JournalRepositoryImpl extends OfflineAwareRepository<Journal, LocalJournalModel, Map<String, dynamic>, Map<String, dynamic>>

patterns_discovered.description: Standardized result pattern for offline operations indicating immediate execution vs queued sync
patterns_discovered.evidence: All repository methods return Future<RepositoryOperationResult<Journal>> or Future<RepositoryOperationResult<void>>

patterns_discovered.description: Consistent use of freezed annotation for immutable domain entities with JSON serialization
patterns_discovered.evidence: Journal model uses @freezed annotation with factory constructor and JsonSerializable methods

patterns_discovered.description: Standardized GraphQL query structure with full field selection and mutation responses
patterns_discovered.evidence: Journal queries follow same pattern as existing Trip queries with comprehensive field coverage

patterns_discovered.description: Consistent lazy singleton registration with all required dependencies injected
patterns_discovered.evidence: JournalRepository registered with all required services (JournalDao, DioApiService, ConnectivityService, SyncQueueService)

gotchas_discovered.description: Created journal.dart with freezed annotations but missing generated files
gotchas_discovered.evidence: Comment in implementation plan: 'Freezed code generation needed (journal.freezed.dart, journal.g.dart) - user must run build_runner.'
gotchas_discovered.impact: Will cause compilation errors until build_runner is executed

gotchas_discovered.description: GraphQL queries added but assumes backend supports journal mutations
gotchas_discovered.evidence: GraphQL queries added to backend infrastructure but backend implementation not verified
gotchas_discovered.impact: Runtime errors if backend doesn't support journal mutations

gotchas_discovered.description: JournalRepositoryImpl requires LocalJournalModel but not shown in diff
gotchas_discovered.evidence: Repository extends OfflineAwareRepository with LocalJournalModel parameter type
gotchas_discovered.impact: May be missing LocalJournalModel implementation causing compilation issues

approach_outcome.approach: Systematic offline-first implementation following established patterns

methodology.phase1: Created domain entity following existing Trip model patterns
methodology.phase2: Implemented repository interface with comprehensive offline-first methods
methodology.phase4: Integrated GraphQL queries for remote operations

approach_outcome.completeness: All acceptance criteria met: extends offline-aware repository, reads from local DB, writes to local DB, queues mutations when offline, syncs when online
approach_outcome.code_quality: Comprehensive implementation with debug logging, error handling, and documentation following project standards

recommendations.description: Run build_runner to generate journal.freezed.dart and journal.g.dart files
Ensure LocalJournalModel exists and maps correctly to Journal domain entity
Verify backend supports journal CRUD operations and GraphQL schema matches
Create comprehensive unit tests for JournalRepositoryImpl offline-first behavior
recommendations.impact: Ensures reliability and catches edge cases

recommendations.description: Test integration with existing TripRepository for related functionality
